name: Chicken Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 2 large carrots, sliced into thin wheels
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the semifrozen chicken into bite-sized pieces and set aside.
2. Heat a pan with oil over medium-high heat.
3. Stir-fry the chicken until browned on all sides (about 3 minutes).
4. Add carrots, peppers, and any optional vegetables to the pan and sprinkle with soy sauce.
5. Stir-fry the vegetables until softened (approximately 3-5 minutes).
6. Mix cornstarch with hot water in a separate bowl.
7. Pour the mixture into the hot chicken stock in the pan.
8. Cover and steam the stir-fried vegetables and chicken for about 2-3 minutes.
9. Lift the cover and cook, stirring until the sauce thickens (about 2 more minutes).
10. Top with desired toppings such as nuts or coconut.
11. Serve over hot cooked rice.
